results.rendered_html:
bhīta p. p. [bhī-kta]
1 Frightened, terrified, alarmed, afraid of (with abl.); na bhīto maraṇādasmi  Mk. 10. 27. 
2 Fearful, timid.
3 Placed in danger, imperiled.
— taṃ Fear, dread.
— taṃ ind. Timidly.
Comp.
— bhīta a. exceedingly afraid.
